subject: Document default entity configuration settings and rationale
body:
Add comprehensive documentation explaining why each default setting
(IFRS, 27% tax, SA Tax Resident, Related Parties, Same Group,
Consolidation Required) is pre-selected, what each setting affects
in the calculations, and when users might want to change them.

- Add new section to BUSINESS_GUIDE.md with detailed tables
- Update README.md to reference the new defaults documentation
- Enhance claude.md with inline comments explaining each default
title: Document default entity configuration settings and rationale
